flowchart TB "Production Incident Response"
  A([Alert Fires]) --> B[Oncall Paged]
  B --> C{Ack in 5min?}
  C -->|no| D[Escalate to Manager]
  D --> B
  C -->|yes| E[Assess Severity]
  E --> F{SEV level?}
  F -->|SEV1| G[Page Leadership]
  F -->|SEV2| H[Open War Room]
  F -->|SEV3| I[Create Ticket]
  G --> H
  H --> J[Mitigate]
  I --> J
  J --> K{Resolved?}
  K -->|no| L[Try Next Runbook]
  L --> J
  K -->|yes| M[Write Postmortem]
  M --> N[Schedule RCA]
  N --> O([Incident Closed])
